title: Koriyama, Fukushima — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Koriyama, Fukushima: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Koriyama is a city in Fukushima with a population of 335,000. The commercial hub of Fukushima Prefecture with excellent transport links, parks, and a growing economy.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
